response:
WITH player_money_ranks AS (
    SELECT player_id, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY total_prize_money DESC) AS money_rank
    FROM poker_player
)
SELECT pmr.money_rank
FROM player_money_ranks pmr
JOIN poker_player pp ON pmr.player_id = pp.player_id
WHERE pp.height = (SELECT MAX(height) FROM poker_player)
LIMIT 1;
